sentence: The code is reviewed before deployment.
translation: El código es revisado antes del despliegue.

sentence: The feature was implemented last week.
translation: La funcionalidad fue implementada la semana pasada.

sentence: The system is being updated right now.
translation: El sistema está siendo actualizado ahora mismo.

sentence: The bug has been fixed.
The app will be released tomorrow.
The database is maintained regularly.
translation: La base de datos es mantenida regularmente.

sentence: The issue was reported by a user.
translation: El problema fue reportado por un usuario.

sentence: The API is used by multiple services.
translation: La API es utilizada por múltiples servicios.

sentence: The tests are executed automatically.
The configuration has been changed.
The server was restarted last night.
The UI is being redesigned.
The data is stored securely.
translation: Los datos son almacenados de forma segura.

sentence: The request was processed successfully.
The application is monitored continuously.
The changes will be deployed soon.
The error has been logged.
The system was designed for scalability.
translation: El sistema fue diseñado para la escalabilidad.

sentence: The task is assigned to the team.
translation: La tarea es asignada al equipo.

sentence: The documentation is updated frequently.
